headline: Assessing HP (HPQ) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And Cost Savings Narrative
summary: HP stock performance snapshot HP (HPQ) has been under pressure recently, with the share price down about 5% over the past month and roughly 27% over the past 3 months. This has drawn investor attention to its valuation and fundamentals. See our latest analysis for HP. At a share price of US$18.46, HP’s recent 7 day and 90 day share price returns of 3.75% and 27.35% declines, alongside a 1 year total shareholder return decline of 31.88%, suggest momentum has been fading rather than...
